content.en:
During this period of time, Ye Tian consumed an unknown number of resources, and finally condensed three hundred immeasurable bones again, and all of them were tempered to the limit.

Of course, he spent much less time than at the beginning, which is also the credit of Taihao's immeasurable body.

And he also cultivated Taihao's immeasurable body to the Xiaocheng realm with the help of a large amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold, making his physical body far surpass that of his previous cultivation of the infinite body.

"With the combat power of this replica body, even if it is a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Void Whale Overlord, I can easily suppress it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

When his strength reached this point, it would take more time to improve in the future, so he was ready to set off directly to the ruins stone tower of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian shuttled all the way here, and although he was spied on by many Great Ancestors, they did not dare to attack Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also blessed a kind of immeasurable ancestral endowment that covered his aura and changed his breath, and wore many treasures, making himself extremely mysterious.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the ruins stone tower, and soon entered and passed through layer after layer.

For him, there were no secrets in the first five floors of the ruins stone tower, so he quickly fulfilled one condition after another, and the speed was unbelievably fast.

In the blink of an eye, he entered the sixth layer, without the slightest intention of staying in the first five layers.

And he passed through the first five layers so quickly, which directly made the other Great Ancestors stunned.

Sixth floor.

When Ye Tian's true body copy body arrived, it attracted the attention of a group of high-level immeasurable life forms.

"It's him!"

The Blood Ancestor recognized Ye Tian at a glance, but the immeasurable will aura could not be completely changed.

But he showed a puzzled look again, because Ye Tian was very different from before, at least with his realm, it could be seen that Ye Tian's immeasurable body cultivation now was different from before.

"That Endless Ancestor told me before that it was his doppelganger, could it be that this is his essence?"

The Blood Ancestor thought to himself.

It is also normal for the immeasurable body to be different from the doppelganger practice.

Even if it is a superior and immeasurable body, there are strong and weak differences, and sometimes there is a big difference.

The ontological cultivation is better for the superior immeasurable body, and the doppelganger cultivation is a little worse for the superior immeasurable body, so the price paid for cultivating the doppelganger is less.

In this way, it makes sense.

"Reasonable fart, his doppelganger foundation is so strong that even I can't compare to it, it must be that he has invested unimaginable resources, and it doesn't look like a doppelganger at all!"

The Blood Ancestor said secretly.

However, Ye Tian's strength is strong now, so even he can't see much.

......

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of talking to the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, now the Raccoon Blood Ancestor was a bunch of enemies, if he talked to the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, he would definitely be in trouble.

And at this moment, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea was guessing Ye Tian's identity.

They had never seen Ye Tian before, but Ye Tian's aura of outsiders could not be hidden, so they thought that Ye Tian must be a member of the Outside Alliance.

"This Great Ancestor has never seen it!"

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor thought secretly.

However, there are several factions in the Outside Alliance, and it is normal for him to not know about the hidden ancestors of other factions.

But even if it was the Great Ancestor of other factions, what was the use of sending a second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform here?

No matter how evil Ye Tian is, if his immeasurable will cannot reach a certain level, he will not be able to walk to the place of six hundred stone steps, and he will not be able to enter the seventh layer.

The goal of the Outbound Alliance is also very clear, that is, to enter the ninth layer and find a way to refine the Relic Stone Tower, so as to occupy the Relic Stone Tower and occupy one more relic for the Outbound Alliance.

"Forget it, it's just a great ancestor of the immeasurable bone stage, there's no need to pay attention!"

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor withdrew his attention and continued to practice and refine his immeasurable will.

However, it wouldn't be long before these high-level immeasurable lifeforms would be shocked by Ye Tian.

Trample!

Ye Tian walked up the first stone step, and then walked up step by step.

The immeasurable will between Ye Tian's true body and body copy body is the same, any one of the true body copy body will be improved, and the others will be improved.

However, the Xuanming Great Ancestor was not a true copy of the body, so the immeasurable will of the Xuanming Great Ancestor was not the same as the immeasurable will of Ye Tian himself.

Now, the immeasurable will of the Xuanming Great Ancestor to copy the body is a little worse than the immeasurable will of Ye Tian himself, this is the effect of Taihao's immeasurable body cultivation to the present, and the immeasurable will has been greatly increased.

I saw that Ye Tian quickly walked to the same stone steps as the Xuanming Great Ancestor's copied body, and then crossed over step by step.

After a while, Ye Tian walked to the four hundredth stone steps.

"Let's temper the immeasurable will here first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he began to temper his immeasurable will.

"Sure enough, the effect of this body refining is better than the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor's copy of the body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this rate of progress, it was only a matter of time before he surpassed the immeasurable will of the Star Sea Great Ancestors.

The so-called realm constraints are not valid with him here, and Taihao's immeasurable body is enough to break the shackles of the realm.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to advance from the four hundredth stone steps.

At first, the Xinghai Great Ancestor didn't care about Ye Tian, but when Ye Tian gradually approached them, they were completely shocked.

"Who the hell is this guy?"

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea had a strong color of jealousy.

And the Ghost Shadow Ancestor was also extremely shocked, did such a demonic Great Ancestor really exist in the Outer Alliance? Why hadn't he heard of it?

"It seems that he is the most hidden genius of a certain faction, but why is it being exposed now? unless he is really sure to capture the Ruined Stone Tower, but how is this possible!"

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor thought to himself.

But after another period of time, Ye Tian walked to the stone steps where he was, and he didn't have this kind of suspicious thoughts.

"It's really possible for this guy to seize the Ruins Stone Tower!

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor said secretly.

It's a pity that Ye Tian is not the faction he belongs to, otherwise he would definitely know.

"Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor, your Extraterrestrial Alliance is really powerful, and you can still cultivate such a high-level immeasurable lifeform, only at the Infinite Bone Stage, the immeasurable will is enough to match us, and his foundation is too strong, and the aura is not at all like what the immeasurable bone high-level immeasurable lifeform can emanate. This Great Ancestor should be the most demonic existence in your Outer Realm Alliance, but I didn't expect it to be exposed this time!" said the Xinghai Great Ancestor.

"I don't know anything, and I've never seen this Great Ancestor!"

Ghost Shadow Ancestor said.

"Humph!"

The Xinghai Great Ancestor naturally didn't believe the ghost shadow Great Ancestor's nonsense, but there was nothing he could do at the moment, it was impossible for him to kill Ye Tian here.

Moreover, if Ye Tianruo was really cultivated by the Outside Alliance at all costs, once he was killed, he was afraid that it would cause a war between the Xuanqi Pavilion and the Outside Alliance, which was not something he could decide.
